prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Ralph state points to final plan and current implementation adds Track Hybrid across provider, tracker, CLI, GUI, overlay, and tests.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Hybrid mode must use the v2 server only for initial/manual reinit segmentation masks.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: RemoteSegmentationMaskProvider posts RGBD to /foundationpose/v2/segmentation; FoundationPoseLiveTracker calls mask_provider only in init/reinit path and track_one on normal frames.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Hybrid must not silently fall back to local SAM3 and must force automatic reinit off.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: build_mask_provider selects Precomputed, then RemoteSegmentation, then Sam3 only when no remote server is configured; build_recovery_config sets auto_reinit false for hybrid and status text reports manual-R reinit.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: GUI must expose Track Hybrid and preserve existing Track Local/Track Remote behavior.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: GuiCommandBuilder.track_hybrid_live builds local fp_track_live with remote-init flags; GUI button invokes run_tracking_hybrid and reinit dispatch preserves hybrid mode.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Timing/diagnostics must expose remote_segmentation_ms, register_ms, track_one_ms, frame_total_ms, and safe CUDA memory fields.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Tracker metadata records provider/register/track timings; fp_track_live promotes timing to JSON/overlay before draw; cuda_memory_snapshot only inspects already-loaded torch and returns empty safely otherwise.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Ralph architect verification and deslop pass required before completion.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Architect re-verification APPROVED after frame_total overlay blocker fix; scoped deslop scan found no masking fallback edits needed after tests locked behavior.

verification_evidence: git diff --check: passed with no whitespace errors
GUI command smoke: track_hybrid_live emits python -m visual_servoing.scripts.fp_track_live with --remote-init-mask-server 192.168.0.3:8081 and --zed-depth-mode NEURAL, without --auto-reinit
Architect final verification: APPROVED, no blockers; confirmed frame_total_ms is assigned before overlay and regression test covers source order

targeted_tests: not rerun in final pass; full suite 325 passed covers targeted tests
